title: INDI Stock Analysis
text: indie Semiconductor, Inc. (INDI) is trading at $4.26, down 1.50%. The stock has a 52-week range of $2.29 to $6.05. The company designs and manufactures automotive semiconductors and software for ADAS, autonomous vehicles, and electrification. YTD Performance: +20.54%. 1-Year Performance: +53.06%. Market Cap: ~$899 million. Beta: 2.73. EPS (TTM): -$0.76 (currently unprofitable). 1-Year Price Target: $6.11. Next Earnings: August 6, 2026. INDI operates in the competitive automotive semiconductor sector with exposure to autonomous driving trends. High volatility suggests investors should monitor upcoming earnings closely.
